quoteLast: one sub called another who answered, and two messages  were sent.
title: The Corsair in the war zone
author: Paine, Ralph Delahaye, 1871-1925

quoteFirst: At 10.16 P.M. a different sub called another which was the one who  received the messages at
title: The Corsair in the war zone

quoteLast: , our engines were slowed down to allow the pilot to board from the destroyer and at 9.42 that night both engines stopped completely and our anchor was dropped just outside of Liverpool, England, while the destroyers circled around us during the night, protecting us from any possible attack.
